title: Agent Design Patterns
description: Reusable software engineering patterns for building robust, maintainable agent systems

lessons.title: Why Design Patterns Matter
lessons.description: Moving from ad-hoc scripts to principled, reusable agent architectures

lessons.title: The Tool Registry Pattern
lessons.description: Dynamic tool discovery, registration, and selection at runtime

lessons.title: Middleware and Hooks
lessons.description: Intercepting agent actions for logging, validation, rate limiting, and transformation

lessons.title: Context Window Management
lessons.description: Strategies for fitting relevant information into limited context: summarization, chunking, and prioritization

lessons.title: Fallback and Escalation Chains
lessons.description: Cascading from fast/cheap to slow/powerful models, and escalating to humans

lessons.title: Idempotency and Checkpointing
lessons.description: Making agent actions safe to retry and resumable after failures

lessons.title: Design Patterns Lab
lessons.description: Hands-on: refactor a naive agent using registry, middleware, and checkpoint patterns
